name: adzuna-jd-fetcher
title: Adzuna JD Fetcher (Cheerio) — JobTrackr
description: Fetches full job descriptions from adzuna.com.au /details URLs via Cheerio over Apify residential AU proxy. Dodges Adzuna's per-IP rate limit that 429s datacenter IPs for an hour at a time. Enriches post-filter survivors; listings come from the Adzuna API.
